project.name: ai-cos-cc-adk
project.description: AI Chief of Staff — action optimizer for Aakash Kumar. ContentAgent + SyncAgent live on droplet, 17 MCP tools via ai-cos-mcp server, Notion + Postgres dual-write.

sub_repos.name: aicos-digests
sub_repos.description: Next.js 16 digest site deployed at digest.wiki

last_session.summary: 68-agent factory session. Built Datum+Megamind+Cindy agents, all deployed. WebFront UX 8.5, Aakash 8.2. CIR live (7 triggers). Obligations built. 8 permanent machineries established. Intelligence: Actions 7.0, Thesis 7.8, Search 78.

current_tasks: 8 permanent machineries: M1 WebFront, M5 Scoring, M6 IRGI, M7 Megamind, M8 Cindy, M9 Intel QA, M10 CIR, M11 Obligations
M8 Cindy: needs AgentMail setup ($20/mo), calendar API creds, WhatsApp extraction script
M7 Megamind: 3 column blockers (action_text→action, thesis_connection not ARRAY, missing strategic_score)

recent_decisions.decision: Agent fleet: ENIAC(research analyst) + Datum(data+ops) + Cindy(intelligent EA) + Megamind(co-strategist, equal partner)
recent_decisions.rationale: Definitive framing from user. Megamind is NOT a slave — co-orchestrates with Aakash. Each agent self-improves.

recent_decisions.decision: 8 permanent machineries that run every session (M1,M5,M6,M7,M8,M9,M10,M11)
recent_decisions.rationale: Living system, not task engine. No machine is ever done. Continuous intelligence refresh.

recent_decisions.decision: CIR two-tier: mechanical (Supabase triggers+pgmq) for 90% + strategic (Megamind) for 10%
recent_decisions.rationale: $0 incremental cost. Preference learning via running average, glide path to ML at 500+ outcomes.

next_session_priorities: Complete CC-CAI sync pilot (validate format, push to GitHub)

architecture.summary: Local CC project with MCP server on droplet. ContentAgent (5-min cron) + SyncAgent (10-min cron) live. 17 MCP tools via FastMCP Python. Postgres (7 tables) + Notion (8 DBs) dual-write. Cloudflare Tunnel for public endpoint. digest.wiki via Vercel.
key_patterns: Content pipeline: extraction > analysis > digest > publish
Build traces: rolling window + compaction every 3 iterations
